release_risk: deploy result provenance could record wrong commit

release_risk: login/auth helper could collide with install cleanup

release_risk: GitHub static gates can miss release/install drift

release_risk: iOS release can drift from shared version or generated project

release_risk: local toolbar actions could invoke production deploy
current_discipline: Actions start or stop dev server and build/install/launch iOS variants only

release_risk: server path constants can drift from install tree

release_risk: startup could skip directory, auth, DB, settings, or shutdown ownership

release_risk: server could bind a different public surface silently

release_risk: settings could own port 9847 incorrectly

release_risk: bootstrap disk helpers could create unintended paths

release_risk: shutdown could leave tasks or DB state dirty

release_risk: two server processes could race one database

release_risk: transport could create alternate server lifecycle

release_risk: bearer auth could be confused with install auth seeding
